inputs.prompt: Hold the establishing frame as the first frame. Motion only: a slow, steady dolly-in forward down the assembly line; rows of gold automata drift past; welder-arms pulse and throw small showers of sparks; faint steam and haze drift through the blue light; at his station the smith works in small movements. Patient, monumental. Low forge hum.

resolved_params.prompt: Hold the establishing frame as the first frame. Motion only: a slow, steady dolly-in forward down the assembly line; rows of gold automata drift past; welder-arms pulse and throw small showers of sparks; faint steam and haze drift through the blue light; at his station the smith works in small movements.
